effects.description: Even when the skill is on cooldown, soul consumption stacks accumulate. Casting D at 3 stacks consumes the stacks instead of souls, increasing damage and range by 50%.
Summons 4 giant souls around you. When the souls are hit by darkness, the cooldown resets and 4 souls are recovered.
When casting Ilseom or Sunbo, summons the Heavenly Sword at the current location.
When casting Welcome Dance (T), consumes the Heavenly Sword and deals additional damage.
When an attack hits, combo gauge accumulates. Final damage slightly increases per combo gauge.
Reusing T while active deals 1 slash proportional to accumulated combo gauge (can only activate once).
Moving for 1 second increases movement speed by 50 and the next attack deals additional damage (5s cooldown).
When a counterattack triggers, Nameless Fist activates for 0.5 seconds. If already active, its duration is extended instead.
Summons 3 magic swords at the location where the sword fell. Right-clicking a magic sword moves it to the location and activates weapon enchantment.
When Death Spin (Q) hits an enemy with Death March (E) active, a scythe falls dealing damage proportional to stacks.
Reusing while Final Sentence is active drops a giant scythe, consuming all combo gauge and increasing damage by 2% per stack.
When a skill hits, energy of purification stacks up to 50. Casting Sweep consumes all stacks, increasing damage by 1% per stack.
When Sweep and Purify hit, grants nearby allies immunity to debuffs for 1.5 seconds.
When channeling, meditates for up to 1.5 seconds, reducing damage taken and quickly recovering energy.
Resets the cooldown of all skills after casting.
While in use, applies 50% of the damage reduction effect to nearby allies.
Frozen Orb (T) — When linked with Q, the sphere does not disappear but bounces out in a smaller form and can be linked again. Re-linked additional damage is reduced to 100%.
Guardian of the Wind is changed to Guardian of the Divine Wind.
Divine Wind (F) — Consumes 25 MP to remove debuffs from nearby allies and grant them a stat increase effect for 6 seconds.
Summons Raphael instead of Raguel.
Holy Light (Q) — Grants the target the Heaven Field effect for 5 seconds when cast.
Judgement of Light (F) — Strikes the target with a holy sword, destroying shields, dealing 75×INT pure damage, and applying stillness for 1.5 seconds.
Crimson Filler (T) — Generates Blood Boil for 1.5 seconds when cast.
Sacrifice (F) — No longer requires channeling. Restores 30 health per second while on the field.
Unholy Blast (Q) — Adds a small ally recovery effect.

Infinite Void (F) — When activated, pressing D pulls up the sphere and surrounding enemies, then slams them to the target location, causing an instant explosion for 20% additional damage and increasing damage taken by 5% for 6 seconds.
Arrow of Destruction (Q) — Changed to 'Gungnir'. Increases damage and range, dealing additional damage proportional to lost HP.
When Chaos Imprint is on cooldown, the skill is replaced with Light Imprint.
